messages.text: monday woke up and chose violence. i need a refund on this whole morning already 😂
can we get coffee ordered as an IV or is that against hospital policy too
got another Anthem envelope yesterday and it looked THICK thick. lowkey scared to open it.
thursday still okay? i’m kinda a mess this week, just warning you. don’t need fixing, just maybe quiet.
Yep, all good here. I’ll call the nursing home after lunch and make sure Mamaw’s appointment time didn’t change.
i’m embarrassed to even say it out loud but money is getting ugly. like smiling at work while my stomach is doing taxes ugly.
This Reel is literally me coding claims while pretending my personal life is not held together with tape and caffeine 💀
Can you park a little farther down tonight? I know that sounds paranoid. I just don’t want questions from nosy neighbors.
running on fumes but cute about it. if i stop moving i may legally become couch upholstery.
I’m gonna skip margaritas tonight. Picked up deliveries because apparently my credit card would like a blood sacrifice.
why did Target make me feel like a human for 22 minutes and then guilty the whole drive home
Good morning Mama ❤️ Hope your coffee’s hot and Dollar General behaves today. Love you.
I ordered the iron-on labels for Mamaw’s laundry. I’ll bring them next visit unless you need them sooner.
I’m okay-ish. Just tired and trying not to make every little thing a whole dramatic Lifetime movie, you know?
monday has personally victimized me and i would like to file a claim 💀
I’m just tired of feeling behind everybody else, you know? Anyway it’s giving inspirational trainwreck, so we persist 😂
Mamaw’s sweater is in the mail! Work’s good, just busy!! I’ll try Mom back after I get home.
I can’t tonight. my brain is a whole dumpster fire and i don’t wanna be weird at you.
I sat in the parking lot holding my mail like it was gonna bite me. I’m scared to even open half of it.
Work’s been busy, Momma. I’m okay, just tired. I’ll call this weekend maybe, promise.
might could, depends on my life choices lol. friday me is currently under review.
Code still works. Please come after 10 though. I just need everything quiet first.
Running about 10 behind due to sleep crimes. Coffee will be my apology tour.
I’m gonna rain check tonight. Headache + laundry mountain. I’m glamorous, obviously.
Be honest: do I look exhausted or mysterious divorced aunt? There is no third option.
sorry, I saw it. I’m here. Just got in my head for a minute.
Pastor’s livestream is starting soon honey. Thought you might like this one. Love you.
Work’s steady, nothing dramatic. I called the home and Mamaw sounded pretty good today. I’ll send you the notes.
I think I might be in too deep with Jay, and I know how that sounds. Please don’t make the face.
girl it is 6:43 and monday already owes me emotional damages. my voice sounds like a haunted drive-thru speaker 😂
productivity audits on a monday is criminal. are you also spiritually microwaved or is it just me 💀
love you too mama ❤️ hope your morning's good. i'm headed into work, i'll call later if i can.
This is a reminder regarding your outstanding balance. Please contact our office today to discuss available payment options.
i'm okay, just tired tired. send me that tiktok again though because the raccoon lady one about took me out 😂
i've got a random admin thing at 11 so if i disappear at lunch i'm not being weird. well. no weirder than usual.
yeah probably. just let me know what time when you know.
Mamaw was in a pretty good mood when I called. She asked about the kids twice and said the cafeteria potatoes were 'not fit' lol.
no worries, drive safe. i'll probably be up anyway.
running like ten mins late. told them migraine because saying 'life is chewing on me' felt less professional.
this is literally us in billing today. i am the spreadsheet and the spreadsheet is unwell 💀
i might skip brunch. budgeting like Dave Ramsey's haunted cousin over here, lowkey embarrassing but i'm trying.
ugh i want to, but i'm dashing tonight because apparently past-me enjoyed credit cards 😂 rain check?
Pastor's livestream starts at 9 if you want to watch. Love you baby, praying for you this morning.
Do you think Mamaw needs more of those grippy socks? I can order some after payday. The pink ones made her happy.
camera angle is doing community service tonight, don't judge me. i'm just worn out and don't wanna look at my own face lol.
girl i am TIRED tired and my bank account is giving haunted house 😂💀 but we persist. might need iced coffee and a new personality by 3pm
Random question before I start coding these claims into the void: have you ever walked a patient through hardship paperwork? Like what actually matters on those forms?
Yep, I can call the pharmacy on my lunch and make sure Mamaw’s refill is squared away. All good here, just the usual work chaos lol
Still good for Thursday? no pressure, just trying to plan my very glamorous evening of laundry and pretending my apartment is clean
i am lowkey in admin hell today. forms on forms on forms. nothing dramatic, just adult life personally attacking me again 🙃
Yeah. Late though. Probably after 10 if that’s still okay.
I’m too tired for cafeteria chicken today. I need a salad, a nap, and possibly a full life reset lol
Made it to work. Hope you got home okay. Last night was nice, even if I’m running on fumes now
saw a meme that said iced coffee is a coping skill and honestly? put it on my medical chart 😂
Amen, Momma. Praying for her and the family this morning ❤️ Hope your shift goes easy today.
you alive?
I’ll look at the nursing home bill after work and see what changed. Sorry I’ve been slow, work has just been slammed lately.
Do you ever feel like every fix makes a brand-new problem? Like congrats, you paid one thing, here’s three more 😂 I’m fine, just dramatic.
girl i am technically alive but only because gas station coffee made a questionable deal with my bloodstream 😂💀 anyway tell me why monday already has hands

messages.with: Jay (saved as Jamie - Stitch Fix returns)
messages.text: i know this is probably not the time to ask, but are you actually still planning to move out soon? you don’t have to answer right now. sorry.
I might be a little feral today lol. Please tell me cafeteria coffee is survivable or I’m billing emotional damages.
I’m in for lunch! Y’all know I can be convinced with soup and five minutes away from my inbox 😅

messages.with: Jay (saved as Jamie - Stitch Fix returns)
messages.text: Hey. Just checking if Thursday is still happening. No pressure, I just need to know what my night looks like.
